response.justification: While Bogdan is an accomplished software engineer with strong architecture and performance optimization experience, this role requires deep expertise in SoC modeling, GPU architecture, and AI accelerator optimization—domains entirely absent from his background. His career has focused on full-stack web, mobile, and backend development rather than hardware design or hardware-software co-design. The gap is not a matter of missing peripheral skills but a fundamental mismatch in core technical domain.
strengths: Staff-level systems thinking and architecture experience with proven ability to design and optimize complex systems
Strong performance optimization background, including real-time, low-latency systems at Dunnhumby handling millions of requests per second
Demonstrated hardware-adjacent experience with embedded systems, C/C++ development, and infrastructure work (Kubernetes, Docker)
concerns: No demonstrated experience with SoC design, IP modeling, or hardware description languages (Verilog, VHDL, SystemVerilog)
Entirely software-focused career with no background in GPU architecture, SIMD/MIMD design, or AI accelerator optimization
No expertise in deep learning workload analysis or optimization for neural network training and inference at the hardware level

key_factors.factor: Missing SoC and GPU architecture expertise
Strong systems architecture and performance optimization fundamentals
